gist.headline: Nothinq but the best
gist.blurb: Nothinq just landed in the community greenhouse! It's a unified chat workspace that lets you generate text, images, and video across 30 different models, all powered by the hive.
gist.summary: Added Nothinq, a unified chat workspace supporting text, image, and video generation across 30 AI models, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Nothinq to interact with Pollinations models in a sleek, all-in-one chat interface.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'Nothinq', a unified chat workspace for text, image, and video. Visuals should feature Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot interacting with a multi-screen retro terminal showing chat bubbles, tiny pictures, and video frames, representing the all-in-one workspace.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot sitting at a retro computer terminal that displays a unified chat interface with tiny pixel images, text bubbles, and video frames. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NOTHINQ'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
